title: Maybe fake BLOCKINIT error with large loop body

features.name: for loop with non-blocking assignment to unpacked array element
features.description: Code should include a for loop with an integer index variable that performs non-blocking assignments to unpacked array elements

features.name: large for loop body with multiple array assignments
features.description: Code should include a for loop containing multiple non-blocking assignments to different unpacked array elements, where the loop body contains many statements

features.name: nested case statement inside for loop with array assignments
features.description: Code should include a for loop containing nested case statements where array elements are assigned via non-blocking assignments, combined with additional statements that increase loop body size
